description: Sector overlay for healthcare providers, health facilities, public-health, health data, clinical services, and health-sector regulated documents in Togo.

metadata.scope: Togo-only sector overlay controls for Health. Intended to be used with togo_core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from Togolese and applicable regional legal/regulatory sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: Public Health Code of the Togolese Republic, Law No. 2009-007
Ministry of Health, Public Hygiene, Universal Health Coverage and Insurance official portal
Togo public health order No. 054/2022 example
primary_sources.issuer: Ministry of Health, Public Hygiene and Universal Healthcare Access

limitations: Rules encode document-evidence checks, not a final legal determination.
Each rule requires validation against current Togolese laws, regional WAEMU/OHADA/CIMA instruments, regulator circulars, directives, codes and guidance before production reliance.
Automated results are screening signals only and must be reviewed by qualified legal/compliance professionals.

rules.title: Health facility authorization or ministry approval evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for authorization, approval, registration, health facility licence, or Ministry of Health evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Togolese legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law status, and legal sufficiency before relying on the automated result.

rules.title: Patient confidentiality and health-record privacy evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for patient confidentiality, medical records, health data, consent, or personal-data safeguards.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Togolese legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law status, and legal sufficiency before relying on the automated result.
source_basis: Law No. 2019-014 relating to personal data protection

rules.title: Public hygiene, infection-control, or sanitation controls are documented
rules.summary: Checks for hygiene, sanitation, infection prevention, waste disposal, vaccination, or infectious-risk controls.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Togolese legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law status, and legal sufficiency before relying on the automated result.
source_basis: Public Health Code of the Togolese Republic

rules.title: Health-professional competence or staffing evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for qualified staff, professional authorization, medical personnel, training, supervision, or competence evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Togolese legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law status, and legal sufficiency before relying on the automated result.
source_basis: Ministry of Health sector governance materials

rules.title: Medicines, medical products, or health warning controls are present where applicable
rules.summary: Checks for medicines, pharmacy, tobacco/health-warning, medical product, or public-health warning evidence where applicable.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Togolese legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law status, and legal sufficiency before relying on the automated result.
source_basis: Ministry of Health public health order No. 054/2022
